description: A Myiarchus flycatcher that was dark olive above and bright yellow below. The most disticntive feature was the dark gray face and the bright yellow underparts. The flight feathers were rufous-edged and the three Tertials were broadly whitish-edged. The inner web of the outer tail feathers was rufous as well.Behaviors: Feeding lethargically from weedstalks and within a Russian OliveCall: none notedPlumage: unknown
